title: TCIL – L-2 Network & Monitoring, Helpdesk Support – 2 Posts
shortInfo: Telecommunications Consultants India Limited (TCIL) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of L-2 Network & Monitoring, Helpdesk Support. Candidates with B.E / B-Tech/MCA, BCA Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through TCIL official website tcil.net.in.

basic_details.job_title: TCIL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Network & Monitoring , Helpdesk Support Posts
basic_details.short_information: Telecommunications Consultants India Limited (TCIL) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of L-2 Network & Monitoring, Helpdesk Support. Candidates with B.E / B-Tech/MCA, BCA Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through TCIL official website tcil.net.in.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E / B-Tech/MCA or equivalent, Science Graduate/BCA or equivalent

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.tcil.net.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
seo_tags: Telecommunications Consultants India Limited L-2 Network & Monitoring
